command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os, time, subprocess
cmds = [
    ('bun test ./scripts/verify-m062-s01.test.ts', 60),
    ('bun run verify:m062:s01 -- --json', 60),
    ('bun run tsc --noEmit', 120),
]
for cmd, timeout in cmds:
    start = time.time()
    p = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, cwd='.', stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True, timeout=timeout)
    dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print(f'CMD\t{cmd}\tEXIT\t{p.returncode}\tDURMS\t{dur}')
PY
